landing.metaDescription: Personal dental care — book visits and stay connected with your practice.
landing.heroSubtitle: A modern practice where patients, treatment history, and follow-up care stay linked in one clear journey.
landing.statPatients: Patients managed through unified clinical files.
landing.statFollowUp: Follow-up adherence with a consistent care plan.
landing.statSameDay: Clear availability and a straightforward booking flow.
landing.connectedAppointmentsDesc: Book online and get confirmation straight to your patient dashboard.
landing.clinicalContextDesc: Symptoms, urgency, diagnosis, and plans stay organized in one timeline.
landing.followUpPlanningDesc: Every visit can produce notes, medications, procedures, and follow‑up dates.
landing.scheduleVisibilityDesc: See open slots and pick a time that works for you.
landing.whyPatientsSubtitle: Every touchpoint is designed to feel clear, modern, and trustworthy.
landing.sterilizationDesc: Modern protocols and monitored sterilization rooms
landing.transparentTreatmentDesc: Clear plans, follow-ups, and explained procedures
landing.personalizedCareDesc: Continuity of care with your history kept in one place
landing.digitalRecordsDesc: Organized timelines with diagnosis and treatment notes
landing.carePathTitle: Your Care Path, Step by Step
landing.step1Desc: Pick your day and reserve an open slot in seconds.
landing.step2Desc: Your symptoms and urgency are captured before your visit begins.
landing.step3Desc: Diagnosis, procedures, and medication documented in one file.
landing.step4Desc: Every visit stays linked so your treatment history is always clear.
landing.generalDentistryDesc: Checkups, cleanings, prevention, and restorative care.
landing.cosmeticDentistryDesc: Whitening, veneers, bonding, and aesthetic smile design.
landing.orthodonticsDesc: Aligners and braces plans with progress monitoring.
landing.oralSurgeryDesc: Extractions, surgical planning, and post‑op follow‑ups.
landing.hoursDetail: Mon - Fri: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM | Sat: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM
landing.quickContactDesc: Send us a message and we will call you back.
landing.trustedPartner: Your trusted partner in dental health

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your email and password. Solo practice owners use one login for admin and doctor schedule.
auth.incompleteLogin: Login response was incomplete. Try again.
auth.forgotPasswordHint: — choose account type on the next screen if unsure.
auth.receptionHint: Reception staff are added by the practice owner from the admin area.
auth.registerMeta: Register as a patient at DentalClinic.
auth.registerSubtitle: This form creates a patient account only. Clinic staff and your doctor are added by the administrator.
auth.forgotSubtitle: We will email a reset link if we find your account.
auth.resetSent: If an account exists for that email, we sent reset instructions.
auth.invalidLinkDesc: This reset link is missing a token.
auth.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.passwordUpdated: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth.resetFailed: Reset failed. The link may have expired.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: We could not find that page.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.description: You do not have access to this area.
unauthorized.roleDenied: Your role does not allow opening {{page}}.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.meta: How DentalClinic handles your personal and health information.
privacy.intro: This practice takes confidentiality seriously. This summary describes how we use information in this demo application.
privacy.whatWeCollectDesc: Account details (name, email, phone, date of birth), appointment and clinical notes you or your providers enter, and technical logs needed to run the service.
privacy.howWeUseDesc: To schedule visits, coordinate care between patients, dentists, and reception, and to send optional reminders when email is configured.

profile.metaDescription: Your profile, medical details, and clinical timeline.
profile.title: Patient Health Workspace
profile.healthTimelineDesc: Treatment details are tracked in your clinical timeline.
profile.clinicalNotesPlaceholder: Any relevant history your dentist should know
profile.noVisitsDesc: Book your first appointment to see it on your clinical timeline.
profile.noFilterDesc: Try showing all visits or a different status.

booking.metaDescription: Pick a date and time for your appointment.
booking.title: Book an Appointment
booking.subtitle: Choose an available date and time for your visit.
booking.unavailableDesc: Online booking is not open yet. Please contact the practice by phone or email.
booking.pickAvailableDay: Pick an available day (badge = free slots)
booking.info1: Appointments are available up to 60 days in advance.
booking.info2: Only available days and time slots are selectable.
booking.info3: Confirmation appears in your patient dashboard immediately.
booking.info4: Reschedule or cancel from your profile timeline.

appointment.cancelConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. The slot will be released.

admin.title: Administration
admin.soloLead: You run this solo practice with one login. Manage staff here, then open
admin.multiLead: Add people who work at the clinic. Patients sign themselves up from the public
admin.myScheduleDesc: {{name}} — view today's appointments, patients, and notes.
admin.myScheduleDescDefault: View your appointments, patients, and clinical notes.
admin.addReceptionistDesc: Front desk can search patients, manage the lobby, and book appointments for them.
admin.addAdminDesc: Optional backup admin with the same powers (separate email and password).
admin.setupDoctorDesc: Create the doctor account for this practice.
admin.soloNote: One login for everything: you are signed in as admin and doctor with {{email}}. Use Admin for staff setup and My schedule for your clinical work.
admin.tipNote: Tip: In solo practice mode the admin account is also the doctor — sign in with your admin email once to access both areas.
